primary.$description: Phosphor cyan-green — primary brand color. Evokes classic CRT terminal text.

primary-tint.$description: Lighter tint of the Terminal primary

primary-shade.$description: Darker shade of the Terminal primary

accent.$description: Medium gray with a teal cast — visible against the near-black background

on-accent.$description: Light cyan-white on dark gray — ensures readability on accent-filled surfaces

background.$description: Near-black with a faint teal phosphor cast — like a powered-on CRT

primary.$description: Bright cyan-white — the classic glowing terminal text

on-primary.$description: Light cyan-white on cyan fill — fulfills the light-on-button requirement

success.$description: Phosphor green success — consistent with the terminal aesthetic

warning.$description: Amber warning — the classic terminal warning color

active.$description: Foreground active state — equals brand.primary. SealStateColor(primary).active

disabled.$description: Foreground disabled state — brand.primary at 40% opacity. SealStateColor(primary).disabled: alpha = floor(0.4 × 255) = 0x66

active.$description: Fill active state — equals brand.primary. SealStateColor(primary).active

disabled.$description: Fill disabled state — brand.primary at 40% opacity. SealStateColor(primary).disabled: alpha = floor(0.4 × 255) = 0x66
